title: Debate Class: Should Recess Be Longer?

sentences.en: Mr. Pan announced a class debate today, and the topic was simple: should recess be longer at our school?
sentences.zh: 潘老師今天宣布一場班級辯論，題目很簡單：我們學校的下課時間應不應該延長？

sentences.en: He split the class into two groups and told each side to prepare a clear reason and evidence to support their opinion.
sentences.zh: 他把全班分成兩組，要求每一邊都準備清楚的理由跟證據來支持自己的立場。

sentences.en: Bernice, on the "yes" side, argued that longer recess would have a positive effect on our education, not a negative one.
sentences.zh: 站在「贊成」那邊的 Bernice 主張，延長下課時間對我們的教育會有正面影響，而不是負面的。

sentences.en: She said students understand new lessons better after a real break, and there is a real possibility that grades would even improve.
sentences.zh: 她說學生在真正休息過後對新課程的理解會更好，成績甚至有可能真的進步。

sentences.en: One boy on the "no" side objected, saying a shorter school day already has value, since students go home earlier to spend time with family.
sentences.zh: 「反對」那邊有個男生表示異議，說較短的在校時間本身就有價值，因為學生能提早回家陪家人。

sentences.en: He also mentioned that his older cousin, now studying at a national university, said high-quality study habits matter more than extra playtime.
sentences.zh: 他還提到他表哥現在在一所國立大學讀書，說高品質的讀書習慣比多出來的玩耍時間更重要。

sentences.en: Our teacher, acting as a neutral leader for the debate, reminded both sides that in reality, there is rarely one single correct solution.
sentences.zh: 我們老師擔任辯論的中立主持人，提醒雙方在現實中很少有單一的正確解答。

sentences.en: William, listening from the doorway because his own class had a short break, shouted that his opinion was simply "longer recess, always," which does not count as a real argument.
sentences.zh: 從門口聽的 William（因為他自己班上剛好在短暫休息）大喊他的意見就是「下課永遠都要更長」，不過這不算是真正的論點。

sentences.en: Mr. Pan gently reminded us that a good argument needs more than just an independent, personal wish; it needs actual reasoning behind it.
sentences.zh: 潘老師溫和地提醒我們，一個好的論點需要的不只是單純個人的希望，還需要真正的推理支撐。

sentences.en: One girl brought up the school's development plan, saying the principal already had a related idea about recess time in progress.
sentences.zh: 有個女生提到學校的發展計畫，說校長已經有一個跟下課時間相關的想法正在進行中。

sentences.en: By the end of class, no clear winner was chosen, but our teacher said the real goal of a debate is practice, not victory.
sentences.zh: 課程結束時沒有明確的勝方，但我們老師說辯論真正的目的是練習，不是輸贏。

sentences.en: Bernice still insists her side technically won, mostly because she was the loudest, which our teacher gently pointed out is not actually how debate works.
sentences.zh: Bernice 還是堅持技術上她那邊贏了，主要是因為她最大聲，我們老師溫和地指出這其實不是辯論的運作方式。

quiz.question: What is the topic of the class debate?
options: Should recess be longer at school?

quiz.question: What does the boy on the "no" side mention about his cousin?
options: His cousin at a national university says study habits matter more than playtime.
His cousin never went to college.

quiz.question: According to Mr. Pan, what is the real goal of a debate?
